__fixture__.name: entitlement_grace_managed_service_unreachable
__fixture__.scenario: Managed services are temporarily unreachable. The entitlement snapshot is in grace, last refresh is stale_within_grace, desktop-core features remain available, and managed-only-requires-fresh-refresh features visibly narrow without blocking local editing. No new managed privilege is granted from the stale snapshot.
contract_sections: Entitlement-snapshot row anatomy / Plan and feature axes
Entitlement-snapshot row anatomy / Grace, expiry, and offline tolerance

feature_rows.feature_note: Desktop-core editing is invariant across identity modes; stays available while managed services are unreachable.
Tasks in a trusted workspace stay available while the seat is active.
Local model execution and BYOK AI remain available while managed services are unreachable.
Settings sync pauses while managed services are unreachable; resumes automatically when refresh completes.
Managed AI quota narrows to inspect-only while the snapshot is stale; BYOK AI remains available for ongoing work.

seat_binding.seat_note: Seat active at the time of the last successful refresh.

quota_rows.overage_posture_note: Quota counters are not exposed from this stale snapshot; BYOK AI remains available locally while a fresh refresh lands.

grace_state.grace_posture_note: Managed services are unreachable; the snapshot is in a bounded grace window. Local-core features remain available; managed-only features narrow visibly.

expiry_state.expiry_note: Snapshot effective window runs until 2026-05-01; grace is the interim posture while refresh is unreachable.

signer_identity.signing_scope_note: Vendor-operated entitlement trust root, continuity verified at the last successful refresh.

last_refresh.refresh_note: Last successful refresh was 2026-04-20; retry is pending until the managed service is reachable again.

policy_bundle_links.link_note: Snapshot inherits narrowing rules from the acme_prod tenant policy bundle.

locally_inspectable_fields: Plan class, entitlement epoch, and seat state.
Grace reason, grace window, and on-expiry posture.
Last refresh freshness and next-refresh deadline.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: A local admin can explain every narrowing decision from the snapshot without calling the vendor console.
